title: Sweet Light Cheese Stir-fry
description: A kid-friendly and kosher-friendly croatian dish featuring a light and sweet cheese stir-fry that's perfect for any meal.

ingredients.name: Cheddar Cheese
ingredients.notes: Use a low-fat variety if preferred.

ingredients.name: Water or Chicken Broth
ingredients.notes: To thin the sauce if needed.

instructions: Heat olive oil in a wok or large frying pan over medium heat.
Add minced garlic and finely chopped red onion, sauté until fragrant and translucent.
Toss in halved baby carrots and finely sliced green peppers. Cook for about 2 minutes until vegetables start to soften.
Gradually stir in grated Cheddar Cheese, ensuring it melts evenly into the vegetable mixture.
Pour in soy sauce and water or broth, stirring well to combine all ingredients and adjust consistency as needed by adding more liquid if necessary.
Simmer for an additional 2-3 minutes until cheese is fully melted and flavors are well integrated. Taste and season with salt and pepper if desired.
Serve hot over steamed rice or noodles.
